ai.name: AI Commands
ai.description: Commands that call AI providers (OpenAI, AI_Licia). Non-blocking — HTTP calls are async.

moderation.name: Moderation
moderation.description: Mod actions (ban, timeout, etc.). Blocking — actions must complete in order.

fun.name: Fun
fun.description: Fun commands without AI (!flipcoin, !fortune, etc.). Non-blocking.

obs.name: OBS
obs.description: OBS scene/source control. Blocking — scene changes must be sequential.
